title: ExtraEmily nearly crashes during livestream, admits mistake after scary driving moment
summary_full: Twitch streamer ExtraEmily narrowly avoided a collision during a livestream on June 28, 2026, after appearing distracted by her phone while driving. The incident, which went viral, saw her swerve at the last moment to miss an oncoming SUV.  Emily promptly apologized, admitting fault and attributing the lapse to recently disengaging her Tesla's Autopilot. This event reignites concerns about her past distracted driving incident and Twitch channel suspension.
